biological_replicate: we screened transcriptomes from 13 nemertean, 6 brachiopod, and 4 phoronid species
technical_replicate: we analyzed peptide extracts of the larvae of the nemertean Lineus longissimus by MS/MS
experimental_design: we searched for neuropeptide precursors and neuropeptide GPCRs in transcriptomes of 13 nemertean, 6 brachiopod, and 4 phoronid species and analyzed them in an evolutionary context
factor_value: we searched for neuropeptide precursors and neuropeptide GPCRs
